api_key.description: ReferralHero API key, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: ReferralHero API base URL override for tests or proxies.

list_uuid.description: Campaign/list UUID used by campaign-scoped Pass B streams, for example MFxxxxxxxxxx.

subscriber_id.description: Subscriber ID used by subscriber detail/referral/reward streams.

subscriber_email.description: Subscriber email used by the subscriber_by_email stream.

subscriber_mwr.description: Referral code/MWR used by the subscriber_by_mwr stream.

subscriber_name.description: Name search term used by subscribers_search_by_name.

coupon_group_id.description: Coupon group ID used by the coupon_group_coupons stream.
